examples: The purified recombinant major outer-membrane protein (MOMP) of Chlamydia psittaci (Cps) expressed in E. coli was mixed with oil adjuvant.
So how does this amazing adjuvant work?
Adjuvant safety is an important and neglected field.
In 1997 it hit the jackpot with an adjuvant combo that protected six of seven volunteers.
It is up to the physician to input and interpret the data generated by Adjuvant!
